summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Titelli Enterprise Dashboard - All backend APIs (27/27 tests passed) and frontend sections working correctly. Login, navigation, and all dashboard features functional.
passed_tests: Dashboard stats display (Vues: 1,234, Commandes: 2, Revenus: 270 CHF, Note: 4.5)
Mon équipe (Team) - List and Add member modal working
Agenda - List and Add event modal working
Finances - Summary cards (Revenus, Dépenses, Bénéfice net, Commissions) and transactions list
Gestion des stocks - Stock items display with quantity controls
Documents - Categories display (Juridique, Financier, Contrats, Certificats, Autre)
Offres d'emploi - Empty state with Add button
Investissements - Empty state with Add button
Publicités - Stats and ad types display (Bannière, Mise en avant, Spotlight, etc.)
Commandes - Orders list with status dropdown
critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warning in EnterpriseDashboard.js: useEffect missing dependency 'fetchAllData' - minor issue, not affecting functionality
seed_data_creation: Test data created during backend tests was cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enterprise dashboard fully tested. All sections (Team, Agenda, Finances, Stock, Documents, Jobs, Investments, Advertising, Orders) are working. Login credentials: spa.luxury@titelli.com / Demo123!. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_enterprise_dashboard.py can be reused for regression testing.
